description: DreamShaper v8 (Lykon) — versatile SD 1.5 fine-tune for fantasy, portraits, and realism
_comment: Fine-tuned on SD 1.5. Excels at fantasy illustrations, portraits, and stylised realism. V8 improves LoRA support and NSFW compared to v7. Uses DEISMultistepScheduler for 25 steps.
_comment_steps: Model card example uses 25 steps with DEISMultistepScheduler. 20–30 is the practical range; 25 is the documented sweet spot.
_comment_cfg: Model card example uses default CFG (7.5). Range 5–10 works well. Higher values increase contrast and prompt adherence.
_comment_size: Native SD 1.5 resolution is 512x512. DreamShaper v8 is trained to handle up to 768x768 without major artifacts.
_comment_vae: Model is fine-tuned from runwayml/stable-diffusion-v1-5 and includes its own VAE. No external VAE needed.
_comment_negative: Recommended: 'ugly, poorly drawn hands, extra fingers, deformed, blurry, bad anatomy, text, watermark'
_comment_scheduler: DEISMultistepScheduler gives best results per model card. diffusers default (PNDM) also works.
